key.name: safe-mode
key.description: Disable all advanced features. Only panel indicator, basic popup, backend status, typed prompt, and voice start/stop/cancel.

key.name: vox2ai-activate
key.description: Global shortcut to activate the assistant.

key.name: ask-screen-shortcut
key.description: Global shortcut to capture the screen for a question.

key.name: shortcut-behavior
key.description: What happens when the global shortcut is pressed.

key.name: show-panel-indicator
key.description: Show vox2ai in the GNOME top panel.

key.name: ask-screen-shortcut-enabled
key.description: Enable the Ctrl+Shift+Space shortcut for screen capture questions.

key.name: screen-context-enabled
key.description: Allow explicit screenshot capture for screen questions.

key.name: model-profiles-enabled
key.description: Allow switching between model profiles. Disabled by default for stability.

key.name: auto-start-backend
key.description: Start the vox2ai systemd user service when needed.

key.name: backend-host
key.description: WebSocket backend host.

key.name: backend-port
key.description: WebSocket backend port.

key.name: backend-service-name
key.description: User systemd unit that runs the vox2ai backend.

key.name: compact-density
key.description: Use a more compact assistant popup layout.

key.name: auto-finish-recording
key.description: Stop and send recording after speech ends.

key.name: silence-timeout-ms
key.description: Milliseconds of silence after speech before auto-send.

key.name: min-recording-ms
key.description: Minimum recording duration before auto-finish can trigger.

key.name: max-recording-ms
key.description: Maximum recording duration before auto-send.

key.name: voice-activity-threshold
key.description: RMS threshold used to decide whether speech is active.

key.name: sound-feedback-enabled
key.description: Play short feedback sounds for recording and copy actions.

key.name: conversation-mode
key.description: Keep recent turns as context for follow-up questions.

key.name: conversation-max-turns
key.description: Maximum number of turns kept in memory.

key.name: history-enabled
key.description: Keep a small recent list for this session.

key.name: history-persist
key.description: Save recent text history locally between sessions.

key.name: history-max-items
key.description: Maximum number of recent items.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: Show GNOME notifications when useful.

key.name: notify-answer-ready
key.description: Notify when an answer completes while the popup is closed.

key.name: notify-command-complete
key.description: Notify when command execution finishes while the popup is closed.

key.name: notify-errors
key.description: Show notifications for backend and screen-context errors.

key.name: screen-capture-method
key.description: Screen capture backend method.

key.name: screen-capture-save-debug
key.description: Keep captured screenshots for debugging. Off by default.
